page.title: Run Quinfall Smoothly
page.description: Verified minimum and recommended specs from the Steam store, compared side by side, plus performance tips collected from the community.

hero.title: Is Your Rig Ready?
hero.subtitle: Quinfall runs smoothly on 55 GB of disk, DirectX 12 and a modern mid-range GPU. Check the table below against your setup.

specs.title: Minimum & Recommended
specs.subtitle: Pulled directly from the Steam store page

tips.title: 6 Ways to Lift Your FPS
tips.subtitle: Settings advice gathered from community testing

ssd.name: Install on SSD
ssd.body: Put the 55 GB install on an SSD rather than an HDD — map load times drop 3–5× and world traversal stutters shrink.

shadows.name: Drop Shadows
shadows.body: Ultra → High has minimal visual impact and gains 15–20% FPS. Medium is the sweet spot for mid-range GPUs.

foliage.name: Foliage Density
foliage.body: Open-world vegetation is the most expensive setting. Setting density to Medium gives a clear FPS boost in forested areas.

resolution.name: Resolution Scale
resolution.body: Instead of native 1080p/1440p, run at 85% scale — sharpness barely suffers and GPU load falls by ~15%.

vram.name: VRAM Management
vram.body: 6 GB+ GPU is recommended; keep textures at High while avoiding Discord/Chrome in the background.

background.name: Background Apps
background.body: Browser tabs, Riot Vanguard, OBS and friends steal RAM and GPU. Keep Game Mode on while launching.
